title: *normal mode* → *insert mode* → *normal mode*
summary: The mode transition every editing change goes through.

frames.caption: *Normal mode.* Cursor on the space.
frames.narration: When you open a file, you start in *normal mode.* Keystrokes are commands.

frames.caption: {key:i}, then type `, vim` — *insert mode,* text added.
frames.narration: {key:i} enters *insert mode* at the cursor; subsequent keys produce text. The status line below advertises the mode.

frames.caption: {key:Esc} — back to *normal mode.*
frames.narration: {key:Esc} commits the insert and returns to *normal mode.* The whole insertion is one undoable change.
